assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a multi-terminal parallel dispatch of 3 independent tasks.
The agent calls model-router to assign the best LLM per task before launching.
The agent produces a per-task model and terminal assignment table.

cases.prompt: Run these 3 tasks in parallel terminals with best model for each

assertions.text: The agent launches each task in its own terminal (Windows Terminal tab, psmux pane, VS Code task, or separate PowerShell window).
The agent assigns a distinct model per task via model-router rather than one model for all.
The agent produces a merged result report after all terminals complete.

cases.prompt: 이 sprint 5 task 병렬로 — 비용 미리 알려줘

assertions.text: The agent produces a cost estimate (task by model) before launching the terminals.
If the estimated cost exceeds $5 the agent asks the user to confirm before proceeding.
